name: io.github.selic/mcp-planner
title: Microsoft Planner
description: Microsoft Planner MCP server — plans, buckets, tasks via Microsoft Graph, ETags handled

environmentVariables.name: MS_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Microsoft Entra ID tenant id (GUID or domain)

environmentVariables.name: MS_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Entra app registration client secret (app needs Tasks.ReadWrite.All, GroupMember.Read.All, User.Read.All application permissions)

environmentVariables.name: PLANNER_ADVANCED_TOOLSET
environmentVariables.description: true/1 registers the advanced toolset (graph_get, graph_find_endpoint) — a read-only escape hatch limited to /planner, /groups, /users
